#719 TASK: add resume-session-modal detection to the AwaitingOperatorMarker family → classifies StateAwaitingOperator (makes pane paste-unsafe) at classifier.go precedence 7 (~line 415).

🔴 LOAD-BEARING CONSTRAINT (#647 class): do NOT key on the bare `Resume session` header. MEASURED: it appears in real bus traffic (self-referential-marker trap — the dispatch specifying the marker contains it; and the corpus GROWS with discussion, was 1→6 hits in 50min). A false positive here classifies the pane paste-unsafe → defers ALL inbound delivery. Marker choice alone can't close it (dispatch quotes header AND footer). Remedy = capturedLiveCompaction's shape: structural companion prose lacks + LIVE-SCOPE, not whole-pane substring. Candidate structural signals from fixture: `⌕` glyph inside box-drawing, keybind legend `Type to Search · Enter to select · Esc to clear` as bottom chrome, positional relationship. DERIVE the predicate against the fixture — don't guess.

LOAD-BEARING TEST: negative-control corpus of REAL bus messages that contain the markers (query messages.db) — detector must REJECT those while ACCEPTING the fixture capture. That's the whole point; a test that only checks the fixture passes is vacuous.

#852 SIBLING (same file, same family): the SHIPPED AwaitingOperatorMarker `↑/↓ to navigate ·` (state.go:376) is itself a bare whole-pane strings.Contains and got 15 hits in bus corpus — worse than Resume session's 6. #852 FIRST AC is ESTABLISH REAL EXPOSURE: precedence 7 sits AFTER the cursor-anchored idle check, so a cleanly-idling pane may classify StateIdle first and never reach it. That's a control-flow READING, NOT measured — REPRODUCE against a capture, don't reason from source. The structural-anchoring fix for #719 likely covers #852 too; decide whether to fix both in one PR or sequence after exposure-verify.

DISCIPLINES (all earned tonight, all load-bearing here):
- MEASURE before filing/asserting; structural predicate > literal string.
- POSITIVE CONTROL on every measurement — 4 instrument artifacts tonight were caught ONLY by a control row next to the number (incl. a grep that grabbed a test-file format string and returned false 0; SQLite LIKE is case-INsensitive, use GLOB + control both ways; LC_ALL=C, this host is de_DE.UTF-8).
- MEASURED vs ASSERTED marks on every claim in PR/tracker.
- Read the GATE at the server (commits/<sha>/status), never the local suite — CI here is gated (enable_status_check=true, context "test / lint + build + test"). Run the actual workflow steps incl. golangci-lint + gofmt, NOT just go build/vet/test.
- Bus-ping Lookout after request_pr_review (review-request skips the bus).
